data.title: York Space Systems is launching an IPO with 16 million shares priced at $XE each, allowing underwriters option for 2.4 million more shares.
data.description: In Denver, York Space Systems has initiated the roadshow for its planned initial public offering of 16,000,000 shares of common stock. This includes an option for underwriters to acquire an extra 2,400,000 shares within a 30-day period. The offering price will be determined later, excluding underwriting fees. York is a defense company focusing on rapid growth and efficiency.

data.title: Next Fed chair likely to be Warsh, not Hassett, after Trump's comments. Gold, silver, bitcoin prices drop; treasury yields rise.
data.description: President Trump hinted on Friday that Kevin Warsh may be chosen as the next Federal Reserve chairman, rather than Kevin Hassett. Following this news, gold, silver, and bitcoin all experienced declines. Additionally, Treasury yields saw an increase in response to the speculation surrounding the next Fed chair. This update is courtesy of a report from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville offers in-depth research on 2026 Toyota Tacoma for local truck enthusiasts in Northern California.
data.description: Ammaar's Toyota in Vacaville is offering valuable information on the 2026 Toyota Tacoma to truck enthusiasts in the local area, aiding them in selecting the ideal pickup for their Northern California escapades. Based in VACAVILLE, Calif., on Jan. 16, 2026, the dealership is guiding customers through the changing automotive industry, emphasizing versatility and innovation in the latest models.

data.title: HCI Group (NYSE: HCI) declares 40 cents per share cash dividend, to be paid on March 20, 2026 to shareholders as of Feb 20.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on January 16, 2026, the board of directors of HCI Group, Inc. (NYSE: HCI) announced a quarterly cash dividend of 40 cents per common share. Shareholders of record as of February 20, 2026, will receive the dividend on March 20, 2026.

data.title: Cellyan Biotechnology Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: HKPD) gets Nasdaq notice for bid price deficiency, below $1.00 for 30 days.
data.description: Cellyan Biotechnology Co., Ltd, a prominent provider of over the counter pharmaceutical cross-border e-commerce supply chain services in Hong Kong, disclosed today that it has been notified by Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department about its non-compliance with the minimum bid price requirement. The Notification Letter, dated January 12, 2026, highlighted that the closing bid price of the Company's class A ordinary shares (valued at US$0.001 each) remained below the stipulated US$1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days spanning from November 26, 2025, to January 9, 2026. The Company, listed as Nasdaq: HKPD, fell short of meeting the criteria outlined in Nasdaq listing rule 5550(a)(2) due to this breach.

data.title: NusaTrip waives Society Pass lock-up agreement with Cathay Securities, Inc. for IPO, involving Nasdaq-listed companies NUTR and SOPA.
data.description: Travel company NusaTrip Incorporated (Nasdaq: NUTR) specializing in Southeast Asia and Asia-Pacific, shared that Cathay Securities, Inc., its IPO underwriter, approved an early release for Society Pass Incorporated (Nasdaq: SOPA) from the securities lock-up agreement linked to NusaTrip's IPO. This news was disclosed on Jan. 16, 2026.

data.title: Carpenter Technology (NYSE: CRS) declares $0.20 per share dividend, payable on March 5, to shareholders on record by Jan 27.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE: CRS) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share of common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on March 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 27, 2026.

data.title: Innovation Beverage Group Ltd received a notice from Nasdaq for noncompliance due to not holding an annual meeting after 12 months, as per Nasdaq Listing Rules.
data.description: In Sydney on January 16, 2026, Innovation Beverage Group Ltd (IBG), a leading developer, manufacturer, and marketer listed on Nasdaq under the symbol IBG, shared news of having a diverse beverage portfolio. The company boasts 60 formulations spanning 13 alcoholic and non-alcoholic brands. On January 14, 2026, IBG received a notice from Nasdaq indicating non-compliance with Listing Rules 5620(a), 5810(c)(2)(G), and IM-5620 due to missing the deadline for the annual shareholder meeting post the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024.

data.title: J & J Snack Foods Corp (Nasdaq: JJSF) to report Q1 earnings for Dec 27, 2025, on Feb 3, 2026, at 10:00 am ET.
data.description: In Mount Laurel, New Jersey, on January 16, 2026, J & J Snack Foods Corp. (Nasdaq: JJSF) revealed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the fiscal first quarter concluding on December 27, 2025, before the stock market commences trading on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. The company is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast to analyze the results at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the aforementioned day.

data.title: Neumann University gets $5M donation for nursing scholarships - largest in its history from William Fegley, Jr. and wife.
data.description: In Aston, Pennsylvania on January 16, 2026, Neumann University was announced to have been granted a substantial donation of $5 million. This generous contribution marks the most significant gift from an individual in the university's history. The benefactors of this donation are William Fegley, Jr., and Jacquelyn Fegley. The purpose of this remarkable gift is to provide support for undergraduate nursing students within the School of Nursing and Health Sciences at Neumann University.

data.title: The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) declares $1.10 per share dividend to be paid on March 2, 2026.
data.description: In Orrville, Ohio, on January 16, 2026, the J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) declared a dividend of $1.10 per common share, approved by its Board of Directors. Shareholders of record at the market's close will receive the dividend on Monday, March 2, 2026.

data.title: ProPetro reveals Q4 2025 earnings call.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has fallen to 4.8%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This decrease represents approximately 450,000 fewer unemployed individuals. Additionally, the report highlighted a notable increase in job creation, with 350,000 new jobs added in the last quarter. Economists are viewing these trends as positive indicators of economic recovery following the challenges brought on by the pandemic.

data.title: Harsha V. Agadi appointed CEO of Conduent Incorporated (Nasdaq: CNDT), replacing Cliff Sk. Paláu-Hernández becomes new Board Chair.
data.description: In Florham Park, New Jersey, Conduent Incorporated (Nasdaq: CNDT) has named Harsha V. Agadi as the new Chief Executive Officer, replacing Cliff Sk. Agadi, who currently serves as the Chairman of Conduent's Board of Directors, will take on his new role immediately. In light of this change, Agadi will relinquish his position as Chairman, which will now be filled by Margarita Paláu-Hernández as an independent Chair of the Board. The announcement marks a significant shift in leadership for the global technology-driven business solutions and services company.

US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Very unlikely supreme court goes against IEEPA tariffs.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent sees $100b to $150b tax refunds to working Americans.

data.title: Essex Property Trust reports 2025 distribution characteristics: Common Stock - CUSIP Number 297178105: Dividend, Return of Capital, Gain, Tax Rates.
data.description: Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) disclosed the income tax treatment details for its 2025 distributions to shareholders from Common Stock (CUSIP Number 297178105). The breakdown of the 2025 distribution characteristics is as follows: On January 2, 2025, a record date was set for January 15, 2025, with a per-share cash distribution. The distribution includes Ordinary Dividend, Taxable Dividend, Qualified Dividend, Return of Capital, Gain Dividend (subject to 20% rate), Unrecaptured Section 1250 Capital Gain, Section 199A Dividend, and Section 897 Gain.

data.title: Lineage, Inc. will report Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026 before market open, with a conference call scheduled at 8:00 am Eastern Time. Visit ir.onelineage.com for the webcast.
data.description: In Novi, Michigan, Lineage, Inc. (NASDAQ: LINE) disclosed plans to release its financial outcomes for Q4 and the entire year of 2025 on February 25, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call to review these results is set for 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Those interested can access a live webcast of the call on Lineage's Investor Relations webpage at ir.onelineage.com. Following the call, an audio replay will also be accessible.

data.title: BTC spot traders face setback as bears defend $98K, causing rejection. Short-term investors profit, will bears hold resistance?
data.description: Bitcoin faced resistance near $98,000 as spot traders showed fatigue and short-term investors cashed out gains. The question now is whether bears will maintain their position at this crucial level over the weekend.
